summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Polyglot AI Translation App UI redesign (iteration 2). All 5 tabs (Text, Voice, Sign→Text, Text→Sign, History) render correctly with new modern design. Backend APIs unchanged and all 12 tests pass. Frontend interactions (language pickers, swap button, clear buttons, tab navigation) all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
New design uses Plus Jakarta Sans font, rounded-2xl corners, soft indigo shadows as specified
Bottom tab navigation with 5 tabs renders correctly
Language picker dropdowns work with proper z-index and animations
API integration unchanged from iteration 1 - all endpoints working
test_credentials: No authentication required for this app
seed_data_creation: Test translations created during testing are stored in MongoDB
context_for_next_testing_agent: UI redesign iteration 2 complete. All features tested: Text Translation (language pickers, swap, translate API), Voice Translation (UI elements present, mic button), Sign to Text (Take Photo, Choose from Gallery buttons, dropzone), Text to Sign (sign language picker, convert API), History (card-based items, refresh). Voice and Sign-to-Text require actual hardware (microphone/camera) for full flow testing.

text_translation.details: Language pickers work, swap button works, translation API returns correct response (Hello world → Hola mundo), clear button works

voice_translation.details: UI elements present (round mic button, language pickers, clear button). Full flow requires microphone access.

sign_to_text.details: UI elements present (Take Photo button, Choose from Gallery button, dropzone, info banner). Full flow requires image upload.

text_to_sign.details: Sign language picker works (tested ASL and BSL), text input works, convert button sends request, AI returns step-by-step instructions

history.details: History page loads, displays 8 translation items in card format, refresh button works

tab_navigation.details: All 5 bottom tabs clickable and show correct components with proper active state styling

design_verification.details: Modern design with rounded-2xl corners, indigo accent color, soft shadows, bottom tab navigation, clean card layouts

api_endpoints_tested.GET /api/supported-languages: PASS - Returns 100+ spoken languages and 8 sign languages
api_endpoints_tested.POST /api/translate: PASS - Translates text using OpenAI GPT-4o-mini
